This solicitation is issued as an RFQ. The solicitation document and incorporated provisions and clauses are those in effect through Federal Acquisition Circular 2026-01. This solicitation is set-aside for 100% SDVOSBs/VOSBs. The associated North American Industrial Classification System (NAICS) code for this procurement is 541511: Custom Computer Programing Services, with a small business size standard of $34.0 million. The FSC/PSC is Q601: Medical Coding and Auditing. The Network Contracting Office (NCO) 1- New England is seeking to purchase Medical Coding Services for the Northampton VA Medical Center as a Firm-Fixed Price contract with a base year and four (4) option years. If you have any questions or concerns regarding this solicitation should be forwarded in writing via email to the Point of Contact listed below:
Sebastian Freeze sebastian.freeze@va.gov
See attached document: Medical Coding Combined Synopsis. See attached document: Past Performance Information Sheet.
